Party Rentals in Enfield NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Enfield NS — a gateway community to East Hants along the Shubenacadie River — with party rentals, inflatables, foam parties, lawn games, and party packages. HRM's busy event calendar — from backyard birthdays to school fun days and community festivals — keeps demand for quality party rentals high year-round.

Travel from Bridgewater to Enfield NS is approximately 105 km. The first 15 km is free; travel beyond that is quoted at $0.72/km (estimate ~$65 one way, confirmed before booking). Availability, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details are all confirmed before your booking is finalized.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, $310, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Kids Foam Party - Foam Party, From $200/hr add-on · From $349/hr standalone, Wet-use - High-energy foam fun for kids' birthdays, school fun days, daycares, summer camps, church events, and family celebrations.
  • 360 Photo Booth - Photo Booth, From $249, Dry-use - 360 Photo Booth rental for weddings, graduations, birthdays, school events, community events, corporate events, church events, and fundraisers in Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School events
  • Community celebrations
  • Summer outdoor events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer party rentals in Enfield NS?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals serves Enfield NS by availability and travel quote from our Bridgewater base, approximately 105 km away. The first 15 km of travel is free; beyond that travel is $0.72/km.
What party rental packages do you offer?
Our party packages start from $370 and bundle inflatables, lawn games, and extras for great value. Examples include the Island Splash package ($370) which combines the Crown Island Combo with a foam party add-on, and multi-item combos that add lawn games and a 360 Video Booth. Full package details are at novakingdomrentals.com/packages.
What is included in a party rental package?
Packages vary but typically include one or more inflatables, optional foam party add-on, optional lawn games, and optional 360 Video Booth. All packages include setup and takedown. Travel is quoted separately based on your event address.
What deposit is required for a party rental?
A deposit is required to hold your event date. The deposit amount and payment method are confirmed when we send your booking confirmation. Bookings are not confirmed until the deposit is received.
What party rental options work best for Enfield NS events?
For Enfield NS events we most often recommend starting with an inflatable that suits your crowd size, then adding lawn games, a foam party, or a 360 Video Booth depending on your guest mix. Our packages from $370 are designed to bundle the most popular combinations at a saving.
